---
title: "kerasnip presentations"
format: html
---

::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}

### Welcome to the kerasnip presentations repository

Here you can find slides from various talks and workshops about the `kerasnip` package.

#### Available Presentations

- [**Madrid R Group (02-2026)**](presentations/madrid-2-2026/index.html)  
  *A Bridge Between 'keras' and 'tidymodels'*

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="spanish"}

### Bienvenidos al repositorio de presentaciones de kerasnip

Aquí encontrará diapositivas de varias charlas y talleres sobre el paquete `kerasnip`.

#### Presentaciones Disponibles

- [**Grupo de Usuarios de R de Madrid (02-2026)**](../presentations/madrid-2-2026/es/index.html)  
  *Un Puente entre 'keras' y 'tidymodels'*

:::
